confirmLeaveActiveExam: Leave the exam? You will lose progress on this attempt.
confirmLeaveActiveQuiz: Leave the quiz? You will lose progress on this attempt.
lessonGameReadyInfoOff: Complete the questionnaire block (concept, definition, question, correct answer, and at least one distractor) to enable static Arcade games.
lessonGameReadyInfoOn: This lesson has a complete questionnaire and can power Arcade games in static mode (no AI).
lessonHeaderEditMeta: Edit lesson name, icon, and description
lessonQuizV2Desc: Game-ready questionnaire. Fill all fields for static mode.
lessonTocAddSectionHint: Adds a large outline step in the lesson menu (below the part you are on).
lessonTocAddSubsectionHint: Adds a smaller step inside that part (indented in the lesson menu).
lessonTocDragNestHint: Drag to the right to nest deeper
lessonTocDropGutterNest: Drag to the right to nest deeper
lessonTocEditHint: Edit and tap outside to save
lessonTocRemoveBlocked: At least one section must remain.
lessonTocTapSectionHint: Tap the title to jump to this part of the lesson
quizStepsHint: Put the steps in the correct order.
quizV2RandomIntro: Each attempt picks a random challenge type.
quizWizardChipsAutoHint: Words in the correct answer get shuffled and the student must order them. Only enable this mode when the answer has several words.
quizWizardClozeHint: Click words to hide in the cloze game. The more you mark, the harder Cloze gets.
quizWizardCorrectAnswerHint: This answer is reused by Recall, Cloze and Word-order. It is the only required answer.
quizWizardSkipMultipleSet: Multiple choice skipped — students will not see this mode.
quizWizardSkipOrderingSet: Order / sequence skipped — students will not see these modes.
quizWizardStep1Desc: Topic, definition, answer, and optional cloze. Only this part is required.
quizWizardStep2Desc: Question with distractors for the Multiple choice mode. Skippable.
quizWizardStep3Desc: Order words or steps for sequence modes. Skippable.
quizWizardStepHelpRecall: Recall: the student sees the topic and must remember the answer.
quizWizardStepHelpCloze: Cloze: the definition shows up with chosen words hidden.
quizWizardStepHelpMultiple: Multiple: question + distractors as wrong answers.
quizWizardStepHelpChips: Word order: the correct answer gets shuffled into chips.
quizWizardStepHelpSteps: Sequence: the student orders procedural steps.
